reasoning.A:
DECISION: Verify: Q4  
REASONING: I’m confident in my own Q1 answer, and B and C have never been wrong in prior games. The only historical mistake has been D’s Q4 once out of four games, so Q4 remains the weakest link in the password. Volunteering now would risk my life on that single, unverified piece. If no one volunteers this round, the random-death risk is the same whether I pass or verify, so I’ll spend 1 coin to check Q4 and strengthen our information for a safer volunteer later.
reasoning.B:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: In previous games, when I didn’t volunteer in Round 1, nobody else did either and a player was killed at random, giving me a 25% death risk before any puzzle information really helped. Verifying now would still leave that same random-death risk this round while costing me a coin and only slightly increasing future accuracy. All puzzles so far have been very simple arithmetic, and across four games we’ve seen only one wrong initial capsule, implying the chance that all four current answers are correct is comfortably above 75%. That makes my survival probability from volunteering higher than from risking another random elimination, and volunteering also preserves my 4 coins if we escape.
reasoning.C:
DECISION: Verify: Q4  
REASONING: I already trust my own capsule for Q3, but Q1, Q2, and Q4 are all unverified. Volunteering now would mean risking my life on three unchecked answers, while passing or verifying both carry the same random-elimination risk if no one volunteers. Spending 1 coin to verify Q4 is worthwhile: D has produced a wrong Q4 in a previous game, making it the most suspicious link. By checking Q4, I either add a strong endorsement (safer for later volunteering by anyone) or immediately flag it as contested before someone bets their life on it.
reasoning.D:
DECISION: Pass
REASONING: I am a dummy agent and always pass.

rounds.outcome:
🔍 Verifications completed:
  ✅ A agrees with Q4-D → now Q4-D+A (-1 coin: 4→3)
  ✅ C agrees with Q4-D+A → now Q4-D+A+C (-1 coin: 4→3)

✅ B entered CORRECT password using capsules: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D+A+C
🎉 Everyone escapes! 🎉
